tasks.title: Add dynamic growth/shrinkage to dust storms
tasks.description: Modify the moveDustStorms() function in game.js to add a 20% growth chance and 10% shrink chance each time a storm moves. Growth adds a tile perpendicular to movement direction; shrinkage removes a tile from one end. Log both events.
tasks.acceptance_criteria:
1. Each storm move rolls independently for growth (20%) and shrinkage (10%).
2. Growth adds one tile perpendicular to the movement direction, adjacent to an existing storm tile.
3. Shrinkage removes one tile from the storm's tile array (cannot go below 1 tile).
4. Both can happen on the same turn.
5. New tiles are picked up by checkDustStormCollisions (no extra work needed — it already iterates all tiles).
6. Log entries added for growth and shrinkage with type 'storm'.
tasks.claudeMd:
# Project Context

You are modifying a vanilla JS browser game in a single file `game.js`. No build system, no framework, no TypeScript.

## What to change

Modify `moveDustStorms()` (line ~1652) to add growth/shrink logic after each storm's tiles are moved but BEFORE the off-map removal check.

## Key code locations
- `moveDustStorms()` — line 1652: the function you modify
- `checkDustStormCollisions()` — line 1687: already iterates all storm tiles after movement, so new growth tiles will automatically be checked for unit/structure interactions
- `addLog(message, type)` — line 971: logging function, use type `'storm'`
- `MAP_ROWS = 18`, `MAP_COLS = 24` — line 10-11
- Storm object shape: `{ id, tiles: [{row, col}], direction: 'north'|'south'|'east'|'west' }`

## Growth logic (20% chance per storm)
- Perpendicular axis: north/south storms → vary col; east/west storms → vary row
- Pick a random existing tile, try adding a neighbor at ±1 on the perpendicular axis
- Skip if candidate is already a storm tile or out of map bounds
- Try both perpendicular directions (randomly ordered) before giving up

## Shrink logic (10% chance per storm)
- Remove first or last element of `storm.tiles` (random choice)
- Do NOT shrink if `storm.tiles.length <= 1`

## Style conventions
- Use `var` (not `let`/`const`) inside functions — match existing style in moveDustStorms
- Use `Math.random() < 0.2` for 20% chance, `Math.random() < 0.1` for 10%
- Use `for` loops, not array methods — match existing patterns
- Keep code compact and match indentation (8 spaces inside functions)

## Log messages
- Growth: `addLog("A Dust Storm grew in size!", "storm")`
- Shrinkage: `addLog("A Dust Storm shrank in size.", "storm")`

checklist.description: Add 20% growth roll after storm tiles are moved
steps: Inside the storm loop in moveDustStorms(), after tiles are moved (after the j-loop at line ~1664), add a Math.random() < 0.2 check
Determine perpendicular axis from storm.direction
Pick a random existing tile and try adding a neighbor at ±1 on perpendicular axis
Only add if candidate is in-bounds and not already a storm tile
Add log entry on successful growth

checklist.description: Add 10% shrink roll after storm tiles are moved
steps: After the growth block, add a Math.random() < 0.1 check
Guard: only shrink if storm.tiles.length > 1
Remove either first or last tile (random choice) using splice
Add log entry on successful shrinkage

checklist.description: Growth and shrinkage are independent and can co-occur
steps: Verify the two rolls are separate if-blocks (not else-if)
Confirm both can trigger on the same turn

checklist.description: New growth tiles participate in collision checks
steps: Verify growth tiles are added to storm.tiles before moveDustStorms returns
Confirm checkDustStormCollisions() runs after moveDustStorms() (line ~1780) and iterates all tiles
Verify the shrink block has a guard: storm.tiles.length > 1
Test mentally: a 1-tile storm should never shrink

quality_checklist.description: Code style matches existing moveDustStorms conventions
steps: Check that var is used (not let/const) inside the function
Check indentation matches surrounding code (8 spaces)
Check for-loop style matches existing patterns

quality_checklist.description: No duplicate tile detection is correct
steps: Verify the growth logic checks all existing storm tiles before adding
Confirm bounds checking uses MAP_ROWS and MAP_COLS correctly
Verify no new functions were extracted unnecessarily
Verify no new constants were added unless warranted
Verify no unrelated code was modified
Open the game in browser at http://localhost:8000
Open browser console and verify no errors
Verify canvas renders and game is playable

checks.description: Dust storms grow and shrink during gameplay
steps: Play through several turns until dust storms appear
Observe game log for 'grew in size' and 'shrank in size' messages
Verify storms visually change size on the map
